[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                [ch]F/C[/ch]
Call me a joker, call me a fool[/tab]

[tab][ch]F[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]
I feel like I'm in the prime of my life[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]C/Bb[/ch]                        [ch]F/A[/ch]                
Sometimes it feels like I'm going too fast[/tab]
[tab][ch]C/G[/ch]                        [ch]D/F#[/ch]
I don't know how long this feeling will last[/tab]
[tab][ch]C/G[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]   N.C.

[Chorus]
[tab]N.C.       [ch]C/Bb[/ch]         [ch]F/A[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]
Darling I don't know why I go to extremes[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C/Bb[/ch]          [ch]F/A[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
Too high or too low there ain't no in-betweens[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Gm6/Bb[/ch]     [ch]A7[/ch]
And if I stand or I fall[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                     [ch]Fm[/ch] 
It's all or nothing at all[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C/Bb[/ch]          [ch]F/A[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
Darling I don't know why I go to extremes[/tab]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]F/C[/ch]
Sometimes I'm tired, sometimes I'm shot[/tab]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]          [ch]C/E[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]  
Maybe I'm headed, over the hill[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]C/Bb[/ch]                    [ch]F/A[/ch]

[Chorus]
